summary.intent: Push a new production release using the new date-based versioning scheme (YYYYMMDD.XX format).
summary.outcome: Release preparation script was run and CHANGELOG.md was updated and committed, initiating the first date-based release (20260327.01).

repo: Project uses a date-based versioning scheme (YYYYMMDD.XX) replacing semver, with CI updating releases.json on tag.
IS_DEV_BUILD const in version.rs gates update checks — dev builds skip update availability entirely.
is_newer_version() has special logic treating any date-based version as newer than any semver version, enabling smooth migration.

code.finding: IS_DEV_BUILD is true when MOLTIS_VERSION env var is not set at compile time; fetch_update_availability() returns early for dev builds.
is_newer_version() treats date-based versions (YYYYMMDD.XX) as always newer than semver versions (e.g. 0.10.18).

workflow: Release flow: run prepare-release script, review CHANGELOG.md, commit, tag, push — CI handles releases.json update.
A dedicated prepare-release script automates changelog and version bump steps before tagging.

open_items: Verify CI correctly updates releases.json when the new date-based tag (20260327.01) is pushed.
Confirm existing users on semver versions (e.g. 0.10.18) successfully receive the update notification after release.
